name: Levels
description: A spectrum analyzer mid-song — neon columns leap to new peaks on every redraw, two channels to a cell.

code.style: --ch1: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4)); --ch2: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4)); --rule: ( @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 12%; width: 30%; bottom: 6%; height: @rand(14%, 84%); border-radius: calc(20px / @Y) calc(20px / @Y) 0 0; background: var(--ch1); transition: ease 500ms; } :after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 56%; width: 30%; bottom: 6%; height: @rand(14%, 84%); border-radius: calc(20px / @Y) calc(20px / @Y) 0 0; background: var(--ch2); transition: ease 500ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
